info.title: Ninety Auth API
info.description: Ninety Auth API provides OAuth2 authentication, client credential management, entity management, personal access tokens (PATs), and redirect URI configuration for the Ninety.io platform.

get.summary: List client credentials by entity ID

post.description: Validates client_id and redirect_uri, generates an authorization code.
